### 🔄**Cross-Training Session \#1**

## **Introduction:**

**{2 hours}** During your shift, your manager will have you shadow the expo line in the kitchen, giving you firsthand experience in how the venue operates and assisting with running food. This will provide you with a well-rounded understanding of each role, familiarize you with our menu and table numbers, and ensure you learn our high standards of service and hospitality.

| ![dart emoji][image131] Objective: Introduction to Expo Training and Demonstrate Readiness for Independent Work |
| :---- |

| ![bulb emoji][image132] Spotlight: In this segment, you will focus on mastering the expo role. You must develop a thorough understanding of how to efficiently coordinate between the kitchen and the dining area. This session aims to solidify your grasp of expo responsibilities. You will need to demonstrate your readiness to work independently. By the end of this segment, you should be confident and proficient in all aspects of front-of-house duties. The ultimate goal is to ensure you understand how the restaurant and back-of-house operations function seamlessly. |
| :---- |

---

## ![white\_check\_mark emoji][image133] **Trainee Tasks:**

* **Expo Station Setup:** Get with the current expo on duty or manager on duty and work with them throughout this training session. Review the items stocked for the dinner shift and ensure everything is set up for your shift with backup items ready to go as well.  
* **Expediting Food Orders:** Expedite food tickets with a trainer or manager. Run food to tables according to the printed tickets.  
* **Understanding the Expo Role:** Learn the responsibilities of the expo position, including organizing and coordinating food orders, communicating with the kitchen staff, and ensuring order accuracy.  
* **Station Cleanliness:** Keep the station clean throughout the shift using sanitizer solution, sanitizer wipes, gloves, and rags.  
* **Expo Station Setup Recap:** Review the proper setup of the expo station, including organizing tickets, garnishes, condiments, and necessary utensils.  
* **Order Coordination:** Practice coordinating orders between the kitchen and the serving staff. Ensure that each dish is prepared to the correct specifications and that all components of the order are complete before sending it out.  
* **Quality Control:** Understand the importance of quality control. Check each plate for presentation, temperature, and accuracy before it leaves the kitchen.  
* **Timing and Efficiency:** Learn techniques for managing the timing of orders, especially during peak service times. Ensure that hot foods remain hot and cold foods remain cold.  
* **Communication Skills:** Enhance your communication skills to efficiently relay information between the kitchen staff and servers. Practice clear and concise communication to avoid misunderstandings.  
* **Handling Special Requests:** Learn how to handle special requests and modifications efficiently. Ensure that all dietary restrictions and allergies are communicated clearly to the kitchen staff.

| Once you've completed the Cross-Training Expo Session, please find your assigned trainer for the remainder of your shift. |
| :---- |

Arrive promptly to your shift, clock-in, and begin working with your trainer in all host related tasks and responsibilities including: Answering phone calls, reservations, take-out orders, seating guests, and handling any issues pertaining to your role

Proper ways to maintain clear, concise communication with all departments

## ![white\_check\_mark emoji][image140] **Trainee Tasks:**

* **Expo Station Setup Recap:** Review the process of setting up the expo station. Discuss any challenges faced during the previous session and how to overcome them.  
* **Expediting Food Orders Recap:** Reflect on the experience of expediting food orders from the previous session. Discuss what went well and what could be improved.  
* **Understanding the Expo Role Recap:** Revisit the responsibilities of the expo position, focusing on coordination and communication with the kitchen staff.  
* **Station Cleanliness Recap:** Review the importance of maintaining a clean and organized station. Discuss techniques and best practices for keeping the station sanitary.  
* **Order Coordination Recap:** Reflect on the coordination of orders between the kitchen and serving staff. Identify any difficulties and discuss solutions.  
* **Quality Control Recap:** Review the importance of quality control. Discuss any instances where quality control was a challenge and how to address them.  
* **Timing and Efficiency Recap:** Reflect on managing the timing of orders, especially during peak times. Discuss any timing issues and how to improve efficiency.  
* **Communication Skills Recap:** Review the importance of clear and concise communication. Discuss any communication issues faced and how to improve.  
* **Handling Special Requests Recap:** Reflect on handling special requests and modifications. Discuss any challenges faced and how to improve accuracy.  
* **Final Review and Wrap-Up:** Summarize the key learnings from the session. Discuss any remaining questions or concerns with the trainer or MOD.

| Once you've completed the final Cross-Training Expo Session, please find your assigned trainer for the remainder of your shift. |
| :---- |

### ☑️**Shift Wrap-Up & Checklist**

## **![point\_right emoji][image141] End-of-Day 4 Training:**

As you complete today’s training, use this checklist to reflect on your performance and ensure that you’re mastering the skills needed to provide excellent service. Review your ability to collaborate with your team, handle guest interactions, and manage the challenges of a busy shift. Completing this checklist will help you identify any areas for improvement and ensure that you’re ready for the final day of training. Let’s finish today strong and prepare for tomorrow with confidence\!

* 2\. Mastering Host Duties

## 5️⃣OLD Day 5 Training – Closing/Brunch Shift

---

### 💡**Objective & Overview**

### **![mega emoji][image148] Welcome to Day 5 of Training\!**

You’ve reached the final day of your training, and today’s checklist is designed to help you demonstrate your readiness to perform independently. This is your opportunity to showcase everything you’ve learned, from guest interactions to managing reservations, and to prepare for solo hosting. Each task is an opportunity to put your skills into practice and build your confidence as a host. Take pride in how far you’ve come, and use today to solidify your competence and readiness for your role. Let’s end your training on a strong and successful note\!

---

![pushpin emoji][image149] **Objective**: Refine Your Service Skills & Demonstrate The Readiness To Perform Host Duties Independently

![bulb emoji][image150] **Overview**: Congratulations on making it to your final day of training\! Today, we'll review everything you've learned and address any remaining questions. Your second cross-training session will commence today, and you'll undergo a final evaluation, including role-playing scenarios to demonstrate your skills. This is your chance to showcase your readiness and confidence in handling all host responsibilities. Remember, continuous improvement is key, so keep an open mind and always strive to enhance your skills.

### 🦾**Autonomous Opening**

Independently execute all pre-service tasks to exacting standards

* Executing pre-service tasks independently shows that you’re ready to handle the responsibilities of a host on your own.

### 🌟**Advanced Guest Relations**

Handle complex requests and potential issues with professional poise

* Handling complex requests with professionalism and poise leaves a lasting positive impression on guests.

### 📆**Strategic Reservation Management**

Optimize seating by balancing walk-ins with reservations

* Balancing walk-ins with reservations efficiently maximizes seating capacity without compromising service quality.

### 🤝**Team Synergy**

Coordinate seamlessly with front and back of house to ensure smooth service

* Working seamlessly with your team ensures that guests receive the best possible service throughout their visit.

### 🏁**Efficient Close-Down**

Lead post-shift closing procedures effectively

* Leading the closing procedures effectively ensures that everything is set for the next shift, saving time and effort.

### 📈**Comprehensive Evaluation**

Participate in a thorough performance review with your trainer

* Use the evaluation as an opportunity to reflect on your progress and identify areas for continued improvement.

### ☑️**Shift Wrap-Up & Checklist**

## **![point\_right emoji][image151] End-of-Day 5 Training:**

As you wrap up your final day of training, this checklist will help you review and reinforce everything you’ve learned. Reflect on the skills you’ve developed, the challenges you’ve overcome, and the progress you’ve made. Completing this checklist will ensure that you’re fully prepared to take on your role as a host with confidence. Congratulations on completing your training—let’s make sure you’re fully set up for success\!

---

## ![heavy\_check\_mark emoji][image152] **Day 5 Checklist:**

* 1\. Autonomous Opening  
* 2\. Advanced Guest Relations  
* 3\. Strategic Reservation Management  
* 4\. Team Synergy  
* 5\. Cross-Training Session \#2  
* 6\. Efficient Close-Down  
* 7\. Comprehensive Evaluation  
* 8\. Shift Wrap-Up & Checklist

---

## ![dart emoji][image153] **Performance Targets:**

* Did you successfully complete a full hosting shift, from greeting to seating guests?  
* Were you able to manage reservations and seating arrangements effectively?  
* Did you handle guest interactions and requests with confidence?  
* Have you demonstrated your readiness for solo hosting with competence and ease?  
* Are you prepared to take on your role independently and continue your growth?
